content: I conducted a late-night yoga session from 9:30 PM to 10:30 PM at Zenith Wellness Center. Afterward, I went to Café Zenith for a herbal tea. Rohan Kapoor joined me at 10:30 PM. We sat together until 11:00 PM. I personally witnessed him ordering tea at 10:30 PM. The receipt was printed at that time — I saw the printer activate. I can confirm his alibi. I have no knowledge of any incident involving Anjali Verma. I’ve never met her. I don’t know why the police are questioning me. I only know Rohan as a dedicated student of yoga.
